plugin.name: MW_Buttons
plugin.author: Proteles
plugin.purpose: Miniwindow spike demo: clickable hotspot buttons

muclient.script:
local win = "mw_buttons_" .. GetPluginID() local WIDTH, HEIGHT = 200, 132 local hover = nil -- id of the hovered button (for a highlight)
local BG = 0x242424 local FRAME = 0x707070 local BTN = 0x4A4A4A local BTN_HI = 0x6A6A6A local LABEL = 0xF0F0F0 local TITLE = 0x00D7FF
local buttons = { { id = "look", label = "look", y = 28 }, { id = "score", label = "score", y = 64 }, { id = "hi", label = "say hello", y = 100 }, }
-- Hotspot callbacks (named globals the host invokes with (flags, hotspotId)). function on_click(flags, id) if id == "look" then Send("look") elseif id == "score" then Send("score") else Note("MW_Buttons: hello from a miniwindow hotspot!") end end function on_enter(flags, id) hover = id; draw() end function on_leave(flags, id) if hover == id then hover = nil end; draw() end
function draw() WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, 0, 0, 0, BG) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_frame, 0, 0, 0, 0, FRAME) WindowText(win, "title", "Click a button", 12, 7, 0, 0, TITLE) for _, b in ipairs(buttons) do local fill = (hover == b.id) and BTN_HI or BTN WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_fill, 12, b.y, WIDTH - 12, b.y + 24, fill) WindowRectOp(win, miniwin.rect_frame, 12, b.y, WIDTH - 12, b.y + 24, FRAME) WindowText(win, "body", b.label, 22, b.y + 5, WIDTH - 12, b.y + 24, LABEL) -- Hotspot: mouse-over/leave highlight + mouse-up action, hand cursor + tip. WindowAddHotspot(win, b.id, 12, b.y, WIDTH - 12, b.y + 24, "on_enter", "on_leave", "", "", "on_click", "Run: " .. b.label, miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end WindowShow(win, true) end
function OnPluginInstall() WindowCreate(win, 0, 0, WIDTH, HEIGHT, miniwin.pos_center_left, 0, 0) WindowFont(win, "title", "Menlo", 12, true, false, false, false) WindowFont(win, "body", "Menlo", 12, false, false, false, false) draw() end
